name: Aurora Mesh
description: Deep indigo-black canvas with a signature soft multi-hue gradient mesh (violet / magenta / teal / indigo) diffusing across the stage like an aurora. Space Grotesk + Manrope. AI-era / generative feel — best for AI launches, generative art, web3 and modern tech keynotes.
descriptionZh: 深靛蓝黑底 + 招牌的柔和多色渐变网格(紫 / 品红 / 青 / 靛)弥散全场, 像极光. Space Grotesk + Manrope. AI 时代 / 生成式气质, 适合 AI 发布、生成艺术、web3 与现代科技 keynote.
bestFor: 未来科技 / 趋势解读
